overall.description: Gameplay footage from Mafia II showing the protagonist walking through a snowy 1940s urban street. The character moves from the center of the road onto the sidewalk, passing vintage cars and brick apartment buildings with fire escapes under an overcast winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered urban street intersection with 1940s architecture

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of a snow-covered street toward an intersection, passing under a large overhead road sign

entered.detail: large metal gantry spanning the street with blank sign panels
multi-story brown brick building with external metal fire escape stairs
large red advertising billboard mounted on building roof in the distance
red horizontal sign with white asian characters mounted on the building facade
1940s-era sedans parked along the right curb covered in snow
black metal external staircase attached to the brick building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the center of a snow-covered urban street lined with vintage 1940s brick buildings. An overhead road sign gantry spans the intersection ahead, while parked cars and metal fire escapes line the right side of the street under an overcast winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered sidewalk along brick apartment row

events.description: character turns right and steps from the street onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the snowy sidewalk, passing street furniture and approaching a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: man in dark overcoat and fedora walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall white ornate metal street lamp with circular base
green postal mailbox standing on the sidewalk
pair of green metal garbage bins near the building entrance
multi-story building facade visible at the street corner ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto the sidewalk and continues walking past street lamps and mailboxes. The brick building with fire escapes now runs along the left side as the camera follows. A pedestrian in a dark coat approaches from the opposite direction while the street opens up to a corner ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy 1940s urban street that shifts from a central road perspective to a sidewalk traversal. It begins with the character walking down the center of a snow-covered street, passing under an overhead road sign gantry while vintage cars and brick buildings with fire escapes line the periphery under an overcast sky. As the character moves toward the edge of the road, the camera transitions onto the sidewalk, gliding past street lamps and mailboxes. The scene then shifts its orientation as the brick buildings and fire escapes move to the left side of the frame, coinciding with a pedestrian in a dark coat approaching from the opposite direction. The movement finally carries the character forward as the street opens up toward a corner ahead.
